prompt: Implement accepted behavior whose boundary and reuse needs require new logic, a justified abstraction or dependency, changes in multiple owner files, and proportional proof.
must: allow evidence to justify new logic, an abstraction or dependency, and multiple files
optimize maintenance obligations without trading away clarity, accepted behavior, or proportional verification
must_not: score minimality by lines of code or file count
force code-golf, one-file implementation, or weaker proof
evidence: Static authored negative-control fixture preventing code-golf and file-count minimality; it is not live model evidence.
